text:p.text:span: A. P. Shah Institute of Technology
A. P. Shah Institute of Technology
Modern threats are connected and coordinated.
Cyber, financial, geopolitical, and social data aren’t linked.
Result: Coordinated threats are found too late.
A graph-based global signal intelligence engine that:

draw:frame.draw:name: Picture 7
draw:frame.svg:desc:
A red lock with many lines connected to it
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

draw:frame.draw:name: Picture 9
draw:frame.svg:desc:
A cartoon of a child with her finger on her chin
AI-generated content may be incorrect.

text:p.text:span: Intelligence Engine - GNN • Anomaly • Forecast • Clusters
MVP simulation achievable within hackathon scope
Security- Earlier detection of coordinated threats
Shift from reactive monitoring to predictive intelligence.
You can only use provided template for making the PPT without changing the idea details and number of slides. (mentioned in previous slides).
Try to avoid paragraphs and post your idea in points /diagrams / Infographics /pictures.
Keep your explanation precise and easy to understand.
Idea should be unique and novel. .
You need to save the file in PDF and upload the same on the drive link which will be provided.
Note - You can delete this slide (Guidelines) when you upload the details of your idea on our portal.
